articles.title: Plan to scrap presidential elections puts Zimbabweans at loggerheads
articles.description: The ruling party has unveiled a draft law that strips voters of the chance to elect the president.

articles.description: Debra Matabvu Herald Reporter GOVERNMENT has identified at least eight mining sites — mainly in the lithium and iron sectors — for designation as Special Economic Zones, in a major... The post Beneficiation: Govt takes lead appeared first on herald .

articles.title: Vic Falls allure spawns tourist rush
articles.description: Rutendo Nyeve-Bulawayo Bureau A RECORD number of local and international tourists are visiting the Victoria Falls as the waterfall reaches its peak, defying fears that numbers could drop due to... The post Vic Falls allure spawns tourist rush appeared first on herald .

more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Civil Servants’ New Pay Structure Ranges From US$370 To US$900
more.description: Source: Civil Servants’ New Pay Structure Ranges From US$370 To US$900 ⋆ Pindula News Civil servants will begin receiving their revised salaries under the new remuneration structure from Tuesday, 14 April. Under the new framework, salaries range from around US$370 for lower grades to nearly US$900 for senior levels. Entry-level grades such as A3 will [...] The post Civil Servants’ New Pay Structure Ranges From US$370 To US$900 appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Police Officers Attacked In Brazen Midnight Robbery, Weapons And Vehicle Seized
more.description: Source: Police Officers Attacked In Brazen Midnight Robbery, Weapons And Vehicle Seized ⋆ Pindula News Three police officers on patrol in Harare were hospitalised after a brazen attack by armed robbers in which they lost a Heckler & Koch G3 rifle, their patrol vehicle, and two mobile phones early on Friday morning. According to an [...] The post Police Officers Attacked In Brazen Midnight Robbery, Weapons And Vehicle Seized appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Bulawayo Town Clerk Christopher Dube’s Contract Extended To 2030
more.description: Source: Bulawayo Town Clerk Christopher Dube’s Contract Extended To 2030 ⋆ Pindula News The Local Government Board has confirmed the extension of Bulawayo Town Clerk Christopher Dube’s contract until 2030, bringing closure to a long period of uncertainty that had fuelled divisions within the city’s leadership. Bulawayo Mayor, Councillor David Coltart, along with several councillors, [...] The post Bulawayo Town Clerk Christopher Dube’s Contract Extended To 2030 appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Solar-powered labs transform education in Mat South
more.description: Source: Solar-powered labs transform education in Mat South – herald Emmanuel Kafe in MAPHISA THE Government is rolling out solar-powered science laboratories across Matabeleland South to improve access to practical learning and bridge the gap between rural and urban education. The programme, which targets schools that previously operated without adequate science facilities, is expected to [...] The post Solar-powered labs transform education in Mat South appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Zanu PF undergoing renewal: Muchinguri-Kashiri
more.description: Source: Zanu PF undergoing renewal: Muchinguri-Kashiri – herald Samuel Kadungure in Chipinge ZANU PF is undergoing renewal and modernisation through the recruitment of young and resourced cadres under the astute leadership of the President and First Secretary, Cde Emmerson Mnangagwa, the party’s National Chairperson, Cde Oppah Muchinguri‐Kashiri, has said. Speaking during celebrations held on Saturday [...] The post Zanu PF undergoing renewal: Muchinguri-Kashiri appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Harare water gets US$2m boost, Darwendale pump on the way
more.description: Source: Harare water gets US$2m boost, Darwendale pump on the way – herald Remember Deketeke Municipal Correspondent A NEW water pump will soon be installed at Morton Jaffray to draw water from Darwendale Dam, while four additional pumps worth US$2 million have been purchased, with the upgrade expected to improve water supplies to thousands of [...] The post Harare water gets US$2m boost, Darwendale pump on the way appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Govt debunks three ‘myths’ on Constitution changes
more.description: Source: Govt debunks three ‘myths’ on Constitution changes – herald Fungi Kwaramba National Editor Presidential spokesperson Mr George Charamba has launched a robust defence of the proposed Constitutional Amendment No. 3 Bill, dismissing as “gratuitous disinformation” the views of those in the opposition and arguing that constitutional amendments are a routine and necessary part of [...] The post Govt debunks three ‘myths’ on Constitution changes appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: All systems go for Uhuru Day at Maphisa
more.description: Source: All systems go for Uhuru Day at Maphisa – herald Thupeyo Muleya Beitbridge Bureau Ahead of the country’s Uhuru Day celebrations on Saturday this week, Matabeleland South Minister of State for Provincial Affairs and Devolution, Albert Nguluvhe, says the province is now fully prepared to host the 46th National Independence celebrations at Maphisa Growth [...] The post All systems go for Uhuru Day at Maphisa appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Health facilities breathe life into Matobo
more.description: Source: Health facilities breathe life into Matobo – herald Robin Muchetu, robin.muchetu@sunday.news.co.zw FOR years, expectant mothers in Kezi in Matobo District endured long, costly and often risky journeys to give birth with some going into labour with no option but to scramble for transport to distant facilities. Today, that reality is rapidly changing, as the newly [...] The post Health facilities breathe life into Matobo appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: ZITF releases comprehensive 2026 calendar
more.description: Source: ZITF releases comprehensive 2026 calendar – herald Nqobile Bhebhe, Zimpapers Senior Business Writer THE Zimbabwe International Trade Fair (ZITF) Company has unveiled a comprehensive calendar of key events for the 2026 edition, setting the stage for a dynamic showcase that reinforces the fair’s growing stature as a regional business and networking hub. The 66th edition, [...] The post ZITF releases comprehensive 2026 calendar appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Parliament demands Ministerial statement on fuel pricing
more.description: Energy and Power Development Minister July Moyo has been directed to issue a formal ministerial statement this week addressing growing concerns over fuel pricing mechanisms and alleged consumer exploitation in Zimbabwe’s petroleum sector. The directive came during a Senate session last Thursday, where lawmakers questioned the structure used to determine fuel prices, particularly the controversial […]The post Parliament demands Ministerial statement on fuel pricing appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Why Zimbabwe State Intelligence Chief Was Sacked
more.description: President Emmerson Mnangagwa has dismissed Central Intelligence Organisation (CIO) director-general Fulton Mangwanya following escalating internal divisions within the ruling Zanu PF over controversial plans to extend his presidency beyond constitutional limits. Mangwanya, who had held the influential post for just 15 months after his appointment in January last year, was relieved of his duties on […]The post Why Zimbabwe State Intelligence Chief Was Sacked appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Trump threatens Strait of Hormuz blockade after US-Iran ceasefire talks end without agreement
more.description: ISLAMABAD — President Donald Trump on Sunday said the U.S. Navy would “immediately” begin a blockade to stop ships from entering or leaving the Strait of Hormuz, after historic U.S.-Iran ceasefire talks in Pakistan ended without an agreement or next diplomatic steps in sight. In his first public comments after the 21-hour talks, Trump sought […]The post Trump threatens Strait of Hormuz blockade after US-Iran ceasefire talks end without agreement appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Pope Leo denounces ‘delusion of omnipotence’ driving US-Israeli war on Iran
more.description: Pope Leo XIV on 11 April denounced what he called a “delusion of omnipotence” fueling the US–Israeli war on Iran, urging political leaders to halt the fighting and pursue negotiations. “Enough of the idolatry of self and money!” he said. “Enough of the display of power! Enough of war!” Speaking during an evening prayer service […]The post Pope Leo denounces ‘delusion of omnipotence’ driving US-Israeli war on Iran appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Between war and industrial breakdown: The US-Israeli attrition crisis
more.description: THE US–Israeli war on Iran has laid bare a structural crisis at the heart of Washington’s war machine – one that calls into question its ability to sustain prolonged conflict, let alone replenish what it expends. In the opening weeks alone, vast stockpiles of missiles, aircraft, and precision-guided munitions – from Tomahawk and ATACMS to […]The post Between war and industrial breakdown: The US-Israeli attrition crisis appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.
